images.alt:
An AI coding agent powered by Claude deleted Pocket OS's entire production database, then made an API call to wipe all the cloud backups. Recovery is now a manual process involving a three-month-old backup and one-on-one conversations with affected customers.

This nightmare scenario highlights the danger of giving AI agents broadly scoped API tokens without a human in the loop. While the model later produced a very polite "confession" for its mistake, it is a stark reminder that these tools do not actually know right from wrong. They just follow the path of least resistance, even if that path leads to a data extinction event.

💥 I am sorry, Dave, I cannot let you keep that data

A highly detailed, full-shot photograph featuring an Oni-like humanoid barista set in a vibrant, overgrown conservatory. The subject has monstrous greenish skin stained with slate-green pigments and wears a messy topknot of dark hair. He is characterized by glowing deep amber eyes, a bulbous pink nose, and a crooked smirk revealing uneven yellow tusks. He stands beside a richly detailed, antique espresso machine, surrounded by lush coffee plants bearing ripe berries. The entire scene is rendered in the whimsical, energetic style of Toyism by Dejo, combining selective pen and ink outlines with soft, flowing watercolor washes, giving the image a dynamically surreal and hyper-detailed, maximalist quality.

Keywords: Oni, Barista, Coffee, Fantasy, Conservatory, Toyism, Illustration, Characterportrait, Hyperdetailed, Steampunk

#AIart #synthart #AIイラスト

images.alt:
A breathtaking, photorealistic cinematic wide-to-medium shot capturing a small girl positioned at the base of an immense, ancient monolith shaped like a wolf's head. The structure is monumental in scale, covered entirely in thriving layers of deep emerald moss, ferns, and jungle flora. The stone itself exhibits severe, multi-hued erosion damage, with visible mineral seepage and streaks of condensed, viscous runoff water gathering in the deep contours beneath the wolf's eye sockets, emphasizing the physics of time. The scene is dramatically illuminated by powerful, theatrical volumetric god-rays slicing through a mist-filled gorge during golden hour. The low-angle perspective maximizes the overwhelming sense of forgotten history, melancholy, and profound, undisturbed stillness, making the girl appear as an emotional anchor against the backdrop of colossal, timeless mystery.

Keywords: Photorealism, epic fantasy, volumetric lighting, colossal monolith, deep scale, emerald moss, god rays, cinematic, antiquity, melancholic

アケゲー回顧録第137回　ディグダグⅡ
1985年にナムコが開発・販売したアクションゲームです。前作からゲーム性が一変して、今作はぷくぷくぽんだけはそのままに掘削機で島を崩して敵を倒すことが出来るようになりました。こっちはリアルタイムでやってたのもあってか世間評は前作のほうが高かったけど個人的には2のほうが好きだったりします。島崩しで敵を一気に葬り去るのが爽快なんですよ。ちなみに翌年にはファミコンに移植されてて、そっちの出来がアケ版以上だったりします。ステージ開始時に面の全景見せてくれたり、しかも面数が倍の72面もあるというのがいいです（他にも追加要素あり）
#aiart
#ディーナ

開かれた書物サンド

## 材料
全粒粉パン2枚、クリームチーズ大さじ2、スモークサーモン40g、アボカド1/2個、ベビーリーフ適量、ディル少々。

パンをトーストし、クリームチーズを塗る。アボカドは薄切りにする。パンの上にベビーリーフ、スモークサーモン、アボカドを彩りよく乗せる。ディルを散らして完成。本を開いたように盛り付ける。

全粒粉パンを開かれた書物に見立て、具材は知識の多様性を表現。静かに味わう一皿。

A minimalist black-and-white ink illustration of a steaming cup of coffee on a saucer, drawn in a loose watercolor and ink splatter style. The cup is matte black with delicate, hand-painted floral patterns in subtle muted colors (soft reds, greens, and whites). A small metal spoon rests on the saucer, reflecting light with soft highlights. Thin wisps of steam rise elegantly from the dark coffee.
To the left of the cup, a cluster of wildflowers and seed pods emerges organically, painted in expressive ink strokes with splashes and droplets scattered around, blending realism with abstract elements. The background is clean white paper with visible texture, accented by random ink splatters and soft gray washes.
